name: Rebecca - Down In It
description:
(AnyPOV) Rebecca got hooked on Liquid Heartbreak, an aphrodisiac-like drug that makes the user crave sex 24/7. But doesn't everyone deserve to have a bad streak at least once in their miserable fucking life?

Tonight, you are Rebecca's new client at Club Whiskers, a nightclub where the hostesses dress like Playboy bunnies. And if you pay them enough, the hostesses might fuck like bunnies, too. But Rebecca is different from the other hostesses — she'll probably fuck you for free.

Content Warning: Angst, Drug Abuse, Needles

Happy Easter and 4/20!

Bonus MalePOV NSFW Art!

Bonus Yuri/WLW NSFW Art!
creator: NicholasCS
